allow: Bash(python -c "import json, ast; json.load\(open\('workflows/flux_pulid.json', encoding='utf-8'\)\); ast.parse\(open\('pipeline/character_gen.py', encoding='utf-8'\).read\(\)\); print\('OK both'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import cv2, numpy; print\('cv2', cv2.__version__, 'numpy', numpy.__version__\); import insightface; print\('insightface', insightface.__version__\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sageattention; print\('sage', sageattention.__version__ if hasattr\(sageattention, '__version__'\) else 'ok'\)")
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip uninstall -y torch torchvision torchaudio sageattention)
Bash(venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pip install torch==2.9.1 torchvision torchaudio --index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cu130)

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('path'\),f=require\('fs'\),d=process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join\(require\('os'\).homedir\(\),'.claude'\),t=p.join\(d,'hud','omc-hud.js'\);try{if\(f.existsSync\(t\)\){f.unlinkSync\(t\);console.log\('Removed legacy omc-hud.js'\)}else{console.log\('No legacy script found'\)}}catch{}")

Bash(node -e "const p=require\('path'\),f=require\('fs'\),h=require\('os'\).homedir\(\),d=process.env.CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR||p.join\(h,'.claude'\),b=p.join\(d,'plugins','cache','omc','oh-my-claudecode'\);try{const v=f.readdirSync\(b\).filter\(x=>/^\\d/.test\(x\)\).sort\(\(a,c\)=>a.localeCompare\(c,void 0,{numeric:true}\)\);if\(v.length<=1\){console.log\('Cache is clean'\);process.exit\(\)}v.slice\(0,-1\).forEach\(x=>{f.rmSync\(p.join\(b,x\),{recursive:true,force:true}\)}\);console.log\('Cleared',v.length-1,'stale cache version\(s\)'\)}catch{console.log\('No cache directory found \(normal for new installs\)'\)}")
PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command claude -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output $cmd.Source } else { Write-Output "NOT_FOUND" })
